title: galathenium macrophyllum
intro: Galathenium macrophyllum, also known as Galatella or Galathenium, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and fever. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and fighting infections. Galathenium macrophyllum can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries.
